title: Members & sharing
subtitle: Invite family or partners to the same ledger
emptyMembersDesc: Generate an invite code to add people
inviteDesc: Generate a code and share it with the person joining
noInviteDesc: Tap below to generate an 8-character code
inviteHint: They sign in, open Members → Join ledger, and paste this code.
linkPersonalDesc: Attach your personal ledgers to this family book to compare household vs personal spending. Each personal ledger links to at most one family.
addPersonalHint: Only ledgers you own that are not linked to another family
keywordsDesc: If a Bot message contains one of these words, the entry goes to this ledger
removeConfirmDesc: They will lose access to this ledger
ledgerTypeHint: Personal: yours only. Family: invite others; the ledger becomes a shared family book.
ledgerKwHelp: If a message contains any keyword, the entry is posted to this ledger. Keywords are unique across your ledgers.
